The S&P/CSE Industry Group Indices are the result of a partnership between S&P Dow Jones Indices and the Colombo Stock Exchange. The indices are designed to measure the performance of various industry groups within the Sri Lankan equities market, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS).
